topic: Website Analysis Skill Design for Claude Code
subQuestions: SQ1a: Static extraction tools benchmark and selection
SQ1b: JS-rendered extraction tools (Crawl4AI, Jina, Playwright)
SQ2a: JS detection and rendering decision algorithm
SQ2b: Playwright MCP tool inventory and limits
SQ3: Compliance gates (robots.txt, ToS, GDPR, llms.txt)
SQ4a: Creator value axes for website analysis
SQ4b: Creator View 7-section structure design
SQ5: Site classification taxonomy and auto-detection
SQ6: Link scoring and mining algorithm design
SQ7: Engineer View design (freshness, trust, readability)
SQ8: Anti-patterns and long-tail bias mitigation
SQ9a: Link density analysis and cross-site trigger thresholds
SQ9b: Cross-site synthesis methodology
SQ10a: Expedition Mode UX and navigation design
SQ10b: Expedition state management and resume protocol
SQ11a: Obsidian and vault storage MCP integration
SQ11b: NotebookLM alternatives and storage architecture
SQ11c: Integration patterns with Claude Code memory system
SQ12: Storage schema and artifact structure
SQ13a: AI extraction tools comparative analysis
SQ13b: AI analysis tools landscape
SQ14: Metadata extraction (Open Graph, JSON-LD, Cheerio pipeline)

criticalDesignDecisions: v1 extraction via mcp-server-fetch (official Anthropic); custom pipeline deferred to v2
RSS pre-check before HTML extraction for blog/news/docs sites
Three-phase JS detection (downgraded to MEDIUM confidence, needs error rate testing)
Seven-section Creator View with Voice/POV and optional Warning
Creator context from MEMORY.md structured extraction (350-700 tokens)
Pre-flight compliance gate (specific UA checking, not heuristic ToS matching)
Cloudflare detection via cf-mitigated header, fail-fast design
Rate limiting: 10-15s polite delay, crawl-delay honored, 429 retry protocol
Expedition Mode with three-file state pattern (prototype compaction resume first)
Link scoring weights are v0 heuristics — expose as configurable
Classification needs user confirmation step (0.60 threshold uncalibrated)
v1 enhanced markdown vault; v2 SQLite+markdown hybrid
AI content: surface suspicion, do not auto-penalize (detection accuracy 65-88%)
consumerHints.marketGapStatement: No existing developer tool provides site-centric, creator-first analysis. Browser reading tools and competitive intelligence tools serve different audiences.
